globalRules.label: Corporate income tax rate
globalRules.value: 17% flat rate on chargeable income, for both local and foreign companies.

globalRules.label: GST rate
globalRules.value: 9%, effective for standard-rated supplies made on or after 1 January 2024.

globalRules.label: Start-up tax exemption
globalRules.value: 75% of the first S$100,000 and 50% of the next S$100,000 of normal chargeable income for qualifying companies in their first three consecutive YAs.

globalRules.label: GST registration threshold
globalRules.value: GST registration is compulsory when taxable turnover exceeds S$1 million under the applicable retrospective or prospective test.
